methodsAttempted.query: site:mahidol.ac.th Mahidol University generative AI ChatGPT policy guidelines academic integrity
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found an official Faculty of Graduate Studies AI/plagiarism guidelines PDF and several research or conference materials.
Firecrawl search found the graduate-school PDF and Stang library pages that refer to plagiarism and AI tool guidance.

methodsAttempted.query: site:mahidol.ac.th "Generative AI" "Mahidol University" policy OR guideline OR guidelines
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the official Mahidol University GenAI policy PDF, an Institute of Nutrition seminar handout, Stang training handbooks, and a Stang library tool index.
Firecrawl search found both the Thai official GenAI policy PDF and its English translation. The Thai PDF is treated as canonical source-language evidence.

Robots.txt allows the policy PDF path and disallows only /wp-admin/ except admin-ajax. Graduate and Stang robots.txt returned 404-style pages, so no explicit disallow rule was identified for the fetched PDF/page paths.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a university-wide Thai Mahidol University GenAI policy, an English translation of that policy, a Faculty of Graduate Studies AI/plagiarism guidelines announcement, and a Stang library GenAI tools page. The bundle uses the Thai policy as the canonical university-wide source-language evidence, uses the graduate guidelines for graduate-level thesis and academic-writing claims, and uses the Stang page only for a narrow approved-access/tool-availability claim.

artifacts.claimText: Mahidol University has established a university-wide framework and practical guidelines for appropriate and constructive use of Generative AI by staff, students, and official collaborators.

citation.citationTitle: Mahidol University Generative AI Policy B.E. 2568
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Mahidol University states that students must use Generative AI responsibly, avoid uses that may violate academic integrity, and clearly cite information or content derived from Generative AI.

citation.citationTitle: Mahidol University Generative AI Policy B.E. 2568

artifacts.claimText: Mahidol University's GenAI policy states that Generative AI use must consider data security and privacy, and that related data collection, storage, and use must comply with applicable laws and regulations.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow staged candidate: official Thai policy establishes a GenAI policy framework and practical guidelines, but this is not marked human_reviewed or canonical.
Approved as source-scoped: the Thai policy directly states student responsible use, academic-integrity avoidance, and citation of GenAI-derived content.
Approved as source-scoped: privacy and data-security obligations are stated in the Thai GenAI policy.
Approved as source-scoped: the claim combines the policy's research-use permission with its transparency and disclosure requirement.
Approved with graduate-level scope only; it should not be broadened into a university-wide rule for all coursework.
Approved only as a tool-availability claim from an official library page; it is not an approved-use or compliance claim.

artifacts.title: Mahidol University Generative AI Policy Staged Findings
artifacts.summary: Mahidol University has a public official Thai GenAI policy that establishes a university-wide framework for ethical and responsible Generative AI use across teaching, research, healthcare, services, and support functions. The staged claims also include graduate-level Faculty of Graduate Studies guidance on AI disclosure and limits in thesis/thematic paper/independent-study writing, and a narrow official-library tool-availability claim for Gemini for Education and Microsoft Copilot 365 for Education. Rejected official results include an English policy translation used only as helper text, a seminar handout, a training slide deck, and an official-hosted research PDF.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The English policy PDF was treated as a translation, not as the canonical source-language version.
The graduate-school PDF was scoped to graduate-level thesis, thematic paper, and independent-study contexts.
The Stang library page supports only tool availability, not a binding approved-use policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
